card.name: Sootfurr Brute
card.text: You may cast this card from your graveyard as long as you've discarded a card this turn. {1}{R}{G}, Discard this card: Up to one target creature you control gets +3/+3 until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Mizzium Cannon
card.text: This spell can't be countered. This spell deals [[b]5[/b]] damage to target creature or planeswalker. If that permanent would die this turn, exile it instead. Iterate {4}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its iterate cost. If you do, double the numbers in square brackets in its text. Then exile it.)

card.name: Burning-Tree Blackhorn
card.text: Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.) This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: Inquisitive Minotaur
card.text: Menace Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Mountain Hurler
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked by a creature with flying, it gets +3/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Shamanic Power
card.text: Enchant creature or land you control As long as enchanted permanent is a creature, it gets +2/+2 and has haste. Whenever you tap enchanted permanent for mana, add one mana of any color.

card.name: Bloodrust Assailant
card.text: Double strike Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, this creature rages. (Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.)

card.name: Fierce Maaka Kitten
card.text: Whenever you discard one or more cards, put that many +1/+1 counters on this creature. Whenever you put one or more +1/+1 counters on a creature you control, that creature gains menace and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Gate Breaker
card.text: Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.) This creature has trample as long as you control a Gate. (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)

card.name: Augmented Monstrosity
card.text: Trample Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. As long as this creature has three or more +1/+1 counters on it, it has double strike.

card.name: Blightblood Abomination
card.text: When this creature enters, distribute two +1/+1 counters among one or two target creatures you control. Each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it has deathtouch. Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you draw a card.

card.name: Razortusk Piglet
card.text: Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.) {2}{G}: This creature rages. Activate only as a sorcery. (Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.)

card.name: Rejuvenated Wood-Kin
Mossback Pulverizer
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature attacks, create 1/1 green Saproling creature token that's tapped and attacking. {2}, Sacrifice a token: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Alms Giver
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, each player draws a card and gains 1 life.

card.name: Ministrant of Duty
card.text: Lifelink Whenever this creature attacks, create a 1/1 black Soldier creature token with lifelink that's tapped and attacking. Whenever this creature blocks a creature, create a 1/1 black Soldier creature token with lifelink that's blocking that creature.

card.name: Clergy Enforcer
card.text: Oblation 2 — When this creature enters, you may pay 2 life. When you do, tap it and put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Cruel Robber
card.text: When this creature enters, target player reveals X cards from their hand, where X is the total amount of life players lost this turn. You choose one of those cards. That player discards that card.

card.name: Corpse Excavator
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Oblation 2 — When this creature enters, you may pay 2 life. When you do, mill three cards, then return up to one creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Euthanist Master
card.text: Oblation 4 — When this creature enters, you may pay 4 life. When you do, destroy target creature or planeswalker an opponent controls.

card.name: Teysa Karlov, Master of Deals
card.text: Deathtouch The first spell your opponents cast each turn costs an additional 2 life to cast. At the beginning of each end step, create a 1/1 white and black Spirit creature token with flying and a Treasure token if a player paid life that turn.

card.name: Treasured Pet
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Assessor of Worth
card.text: Flying, lifelink Ward—Pay 4 life. Oblation 6 — When this creature enters, you may pay 6 life. When you do, destroy each other creature.

card.name: Priest of The Welcoming
card.text: Oblation X — When this creature enters, you may pay X life. When you do, return any number of target creature, enchantment and/or planeswalker cards with total mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on them.

card.name: Vicious Blackmailer
card.text: Flash If an opponent would draw a card except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, instead you draw a card unless they pay 2 life. If they do, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Orzhov Exorcist
card.text: Vigilance Oblation 4 — When this creature enters, you may pay 4 life. When you do, exile target artifact or enchantment. When this creature dies, you and target opponent each create a Treasure token.

card.name: Vulpus Honorguard
card.text: When this creature enters, flourish 2. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.) {T}: Add {G}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Howling Gate
card.text: Defender (This creature can't attack.) At the beginning of your end step, if you gained or lost life this turn, surveil 1.

card.name: Knight of Denial
card.text: Vigilance, menace When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Pontific Guard
card.text: Flash Flying Oblation 2 — When this creature enters, you may pay 2 life. When you do, another target creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Profane Ceremony
card.text: Choose one or both — • Exile any number of target players' graveyards. You gain 1 life for each creature card exiled this way. • Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Pruning
card.text: Exile all nontoken creatures. Flourish X, where X is the number of creatures exiled this way. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to X creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.)

card.name: Flowerbed Envoy's Call
card.text: Create a 4/4 green Rhino creature token with trample. When you do, flourish 5, then draw a card for each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to five creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.)

card.name: Dutiful Archprotector
card.text: Your opponents can't cast spells during your turn. During turns other than yours, you and other creatures you control have hexproof.

card.name: Worldring Ouroboros
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each counters among creatures you control. Flying, trample Whenever this creature enters or attacks, create a 5/5 green Wurm creature token with trample. If this card would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, reveal it and shuffle it into its owner's library instead.

card.name: Ledev Captain
card.text: Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.) When this creature enters, create a 2/2 green and white Elf Knight creature tokens with vigilance.

card.name: Leaf Storm
card.text: This spell costs {3} less to cast if it targets a tapped permanent. Exile target nonland permanent.

card.name: Coordinated Assault
card.text: When this enchantment enters, flourish 2. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.) Whenever you attack, if the total power of attacking creatures you control is 4 or greater, you draw a card.

card.name: Protector of the Glade
card.text: Defender As long as you control a creature with a +1/+1 counter on it, this creature can attack as though it didn't have defender.

card.name: Selesnya Caretaker
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, search your library for a basic Forest card or a basic Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Sowing Courier
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Bird creature tokens with flying, then flourish 2. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.)

card.name: Branching Possibilities
card.text: This spell can't be countered or copied. Copy target instant spell, sorcery spell, activated ability, or triggered ability X times. You may choose new targets for the copies. The copies can't be countered.

card.name: Ral, Thundering Genius
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, choose one — • When you cast your next instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy. You may only cast one spell this turn. • Draw a card, then discard a card. Add {U}{R}. Spend this mana only to cast instant or sorcery spells.

card.name: Essencesnatch
card.text: Counter target spell. If that spell is countered this way, choose one — • Create a 1/1 blue Faerie creature token with flying and prowess. • Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. • Draw a card.

card.name: Ceremony of Fury
card.text: Target creature you control rages. It fights up to one target creature you don't control. (Put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.)

card.name: Overflowing Buffer
card.text: Return up to [[b]three[/b]] target nonland permanents to their owner's hand. Then you may cast a spell with mana value X or less from your hand without paying its mana cost, where X is the greatest number of cards in any player's hand. Iterate {8}{U}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its iterate cost. If you do, double the numbers in square brackets in its text. Then exile it.)

card.name: Thought Accelerator
card.text: Draw [[b]two[/b]] cards, then discard [[b]one[/b]] card(s). Iterate {4}{U}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its iterate cost. If you do, double the numbers in square brackets in its text. Then exile it.)

card.name: Blinding Flash
card.text: Tap up to one target creature and put [[b]one[/b]] stun counter(s) on it. Draw a card. Iterate {3}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its iterate cost. If you do, double the numbers in square brackets in its text. Then exile it.)

card.name: Voltaic Strike
card.text: This spell deals [[b]2[/b]] damage to any target. Iterate {4}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its iterate cost. If you do, double the numbers in square brackets in its text. Then exile it.)

card.name: Mass Scrambler
card.text: Whenever you discard one or more cards or cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Flux Launcher Maniac
card.text: Trample Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If that spell was cast from your graveyard, put two +1/+1 counters on this creature instead.

card.name: Ecstatic Fluxburster
card.text: Flying, haste As you cast this spell, choose one — • This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. • When this creature enters, you may exile an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. If you do, it deals damage equal to that card's mana value to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Bionic Strength
card.text: Put [[b]one[/b]] +1/+1 counter(s) on target creature you control. It gains trample and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw [[b]one[/b]] card(s)" until end of turn. Iterate {2}{U}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its iterate cost. If you do, double the numbers in square brackets in its text. Then exile it.)

card.name: Fluctuating Reality
card.text: Choose [[b]one[/b]] — • Return up to one target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. • Mill three cards. You may put an instant or sorcery card from among the milled cards into your hand. Iterate {3}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its iterate cost. If you do, double the numbers in square brackets in its text. Then exile it.)

card.name: Aether Condensator
card.text: Exile the top [[b]one[/b]] card(s) of your library. You may play cards exiled this way this turn. Iterate {R}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its iterate cost. If you do, double the numbers in square brackets in its text. Then exile it.)

card.name: Cognition Theft
card.text: Target player mills three cards. You may play a land card and/or cast a nonland card milled this way without paying its mana cost. Cover up 3—{1}{U}{B} ({1}{U}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Cover up only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Blood-Drenched Spoil
card.text: This artifact enters tapped with two stun counters on it. At the beginning of each end step, if you gained life this turn, untap this artifact. {T}: The next time you cast a spell this turn, pay life equal to its mana value rather than pay its mana cost.

card.name: Shambling Grotesquerie
card.text: Lifelink Cover up 2—{U}{U}{B} ({U}{U}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Cover up only as a sorcery.) When you cover up this card, target player mills three cards.

card.name: Deeproot Entity
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Creature spells you control and abilities of creatures you control can't be countered. If a triggered ability of another creature or land you control triggers, it triggers two additional times.

card.name: Storm Eater
card.text: Flying Ward—Pay 5 life. Whenever you cast a spell, this creature deals X damage to any target, where X is the amount of mana spent to cast that spell.

card.name: Clawing Grasp
card.text: Exile target creature with mana value 3 or less. Cover up 2—{2}{B} ({2}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Cover up only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Orzhov Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Dimir Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Izzet Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Gateway Plaza
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Transguild Square
card.text: When this land enters, if you control two or more Gates, scry 3. {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any type that a Gate you control could produce.

card.name: Orzhov Insignia
card.text: When this artifact enters, scry 2. {1}, {T}: Add {W} or {B}. {W}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile up to three target cards from a single graveyard. You gain 3 life.

card.name: Gruul Insignia
card.text: When this artifact enters, scry 2. {1}, {T}: Add {R} or {G}. {R}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains haste until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Izzet Insignia
card.text: When this artifact enters, scry 2. {1}, {T}: Add {U} or {R}. {2}{U}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw two cards, then discard a card. Create a Treasure token.

card.name: Selesnya Insignia
card.text: When this artifact enters, scry 2. {1}, {T}: Add {G} or {W}. {3}{G}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. They gain trample until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Dimir Insignia
card.text: When this artifact enters, scry 2. {1}, {T}: Add {U} or {B}. {1}{U}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Surveil 3, then draw a card.

card.name: Custodian of the Guildpact
card.text: Custodian of the Guildpact is all colors. When this artifact enters, scry 2. {1}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Living Monument
card.text: Defender (This creature can't attack.) Whenever a Gate you control enters, until end of turn, this creature gains vigilance, can attack as though it didn't have defender, and assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power.

card.name: Shield of the Guildpact
card.text: Equipped creature gets +0/+2 for each Gate you control and has "Ward {X}", where X is the number of Gates you control. During your turn, equipped creature assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power. Equip {3} ({3}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Vault of the Paruns
card.text: Whenever you cast this spell or a multicolored spell, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn — • Create a 2/2 Citizen creature token that's all colors. • Draw a card. • You gain 3 life.

card.name: Oblivion Urn
card.text: {T}: Target player exiles a card from their graveyard. {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color. Add two mana in any combination of colors instead if two or more cards were exiled with this artifact.

card.name: Pruniv, Prismatic Custodian
card.text: Pruniv is all colors. Affinity for Gates (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Gate you control.) Hexproof from monocolored. Multicolored spells you cast have affinity for Gates.

card.name: Watery Grave
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Stomping Ground
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Temple Garden
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Godless Shrine
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {B}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Steam Vents
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Hidden Scrutiny
card.text: When this enchantment enters, surveil 1. You may look at an additional card each time you cover up, scry or surveil.

card.name: Vital Reclamation
card.text: Destroy all artifacts and enchantments. Untap a creature or land you control for each permanent destroyed this way. {1}{G}, Discard this card: Return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Backstreet Informant
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Cover up 2—{2}{UB}{UB} ({2}{UB}{UB}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Cover up only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Incapacitating Probing
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-0 until end of turn. Surveil 2. Cover up 2—{2}{U} ({2}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Cover up only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Anguished Fall
card.text: Each opponent sacrifices a creature. If {U} was spent to cast this spell, target player mills three cards.

card.name: World-Tree Guardian
card.text: Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.) When this creature enters, flourish 3. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to three creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.)

card.name: Protector of the Meek
card.text: Flying, vigilance When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Deep Sewage Lurker
card.text: When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. That creature's controller mills four cards.

card.name: Thrull Collectors
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Your opponents can't gain life. Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Frontline Cultivator
card.text: When this creature enters, flourish 2. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.) During your turn, creatures you control with a +1/+1 counter on them have first strike.

card.name: Ninth District Benevolent
card.text: When this creature enters, scry 2 and you gain X life, where X the number of Gates you control.

card.name: Shady Courier
card.text: Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.) Cover up 3—{3}{U}{U} ({3}{U}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Cover up only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Lightningquake
card.text: This spell deals 4 damage to up to one target creature. If {G} was spent to cast this spell, up to one target land you control becomes a 4/4 Elemental creature with haste until end of turn. It's still a land.

card.name: Fires of Reclamation
card.text: Choose one — • This spell deals 3 damage to each creature and each planeswalker. • Create a 3/3 red Elemental creature token with haste.

card.name: Conclave Sentinel
card.text: Vigilance, reach, ward {2}

card.name: Brilliant Artist
card.text: Flying Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Flood of Memories
card.text: Target player shuffles their graveyard into their library. Target player mills that many cards.

card.name: Duskmantle Agent
card.text: Flying, deathtouch When this creature enters, target player reveals cards from the top of their library until they reveal three land cards, then puts those cards into their graveyard.

card.name: Mad Alchemist
card.text: When this creature enters, discard a card, then draw a card. Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell or discard one or more cards, create a tapped Treasure token. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Mounted Warbeast
card.text: First strike, haste {R}, Sacrifice this creature: Target creature you control rages. Activate only as a sorcery. (Put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.)

card.name: Rumbling Drake
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Catacombs Cleaner
card.text: Flash Cover up 2—{3}{U}{U} ({3}{U}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Cover up only as a sorcery.) When you cover up this card, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Winged Mare
card.text: Flying Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Thraka, Ire of the Wilds
Cleanser of Debt
card.text: Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.) At the beginning of your end step, if you gained or lost life this turn, create a 1/1 black Bat creature token with flying.

card.name: 1/1 Spirit RNF
card.text: Flying

card.name: Hellion Star RNF
card.text: Haste

card.name: 2/2 Citizen RNF
card.text: This creature is all colors.

card.name: Elemental Star RNF
card.text: This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creatures you control.

card.name: 1/1 Bird RNF
card.text: Flying

card.name: 2/2 Elf Knight RNF
card.text: Vigilance

card.name: Treasure RNF
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: 3/3 Elemental RNF
card.text: Haste

card.name: Zhur-Taa Ember Shaman
card.text: {T}: Another target creature you control gains haste until end of turn. {1}{R}, {T}: Another target creature you control rages. Activate only as a sorcery. (Put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.)

card.name: Falling Apart
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact or enchantment. • Destroy target tapped creature.

card.name: Call of the Hunt
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. Creatures you control with a +1/+1 counter on them gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Deadly Familiar
card.text: Vigilance, haste Oblation 2 — When this creature enters, you may pay 2 life. When you do, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Deafening Cacophony
card.text: This spell deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. If {B} was spent to cast this spell, you gain life equal to the damage dealt this way.

card.name: Mind Tap
card.text: Tap target creature and put two stun counters on it. Scry 1. Then if {R} was spent to cast this spell, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Izzet Apprentice
card.text: {T}: Add {R}. {2}{U}, {T}, Exile an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard: Draw a card.

card.name: Slitz-Clan Opportunist
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature. {2}{R}: This creature gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Debtor Hunter
card.text: Flying {W}, {T}: Tap target creature.

card.name: Lightning Rider
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each mana you spent to cast instant or sorcery spells this turn. Flying, haste When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Priest of the Old Ways
card.text: When this creature enters, target creature you control rages. It gains trample and haste until end of turn. (Put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.)

card.name: Magebane Rawhide
card.text: Whenever an opponent casts a noncreature spell, this creature rages, then deals damage equal to the number of counters on it to that player. (Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.)

card.name: Caller of the Wilds
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, another target creature you control rages X times, where X is this creature's power. (Put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.)

card.name: Illuminator Imp
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, look at target opponent's hand. You may exile a nonland card from it. If you exiled a card this way, that player draws a card.

card.name: Arrogant Hermit
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, if at least five mana was spent to cast it, draw a card. {T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast an instant or sorcery spell. {T}: Add {C}{C}. Spend this mana only to cast spells from your graveyard and/or activate abilities.

card.name: Guardian of the Hour
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, if it's an opponent's combat phase, end the phase and that player can't cast spells this turn. Otherwise, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Unearthed Mysteries
card.text: Return target creature card from a graveyard to the battlefield under your control with a finality counter on it. Cover up 3—{3}{B} ({3}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Cover up only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Archway Sphinx
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, draw half X cards, where X is the number of Gates you control, rounded down.

card.name: Lightning Catalyst
card.text: Prowess Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets only this creature, you may copy that spell. You may chose a new target for the copy. Do this only once each turn. {2}{UR}: Change the target of target spell with a single target creature to this creature.

card.name: Maree, Nivix Grand Chamberlain
card.text: Whenever an instant or sorcery card leaves your graveyard, draw a card and Maree deals 1 damage to each opponent. {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card. {4}{U}{R}: Exile up to one target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard and copy it. You may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Reload // Relegate
card.text:
Discard any number of cards, then draw that many cards plus one.
---
Counter target spell. Then if a spell is countered this way, you may cast an instant or sorcery spell with equal or lesser mana value from your hand without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Factory Line
card.text: Create [[b]X[/b]] 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature tokens. They gain flying and haste until end of turn. Iterate {X}{U}{U}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its iterate cost. If you do, double the numbers in square brackets in its text. Then exile it.)

card.name: Workshop Supervisor
card.text: Ward—{2}, Pay 2 life. Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, create X 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature tokens, where X is the amount of mana spent to cast that spell. Creatures you control gain haste until end of turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Blessing of Savagery
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Untap them. There is an additional combat phase after this phase followed by an additional main phase.

card.name: Bushfire Shaman
card.text: When this creature enters, destroy up to one target land. If a land was destroyed this way, search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. That land's controller does the same.

card.name: Ghor-Clan Charger
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on each attacking creature you control. Each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it has trample.

card.name: Ram // Rampage
card.text:
Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. It fights target creature you don't control.
---
Creatures you control get +4/+2 until end of turn. Each creature your opponents control blocks this turn if able.

card.name: Rakasht, Spawn of Ulasht
card.text: Rakasht enters with a number of +1/+1 counters on it equal to total number of land and creature cards in all graveyards. {X}, Remove X +1/+1 counters from among creatures you control: Choose one. Activate only once each turn. • This creature deals X damage to any target. • Create a X/X red and green Hellion creature token with haste.

card.name: Mind Warp
card.text: Gain control of target creature an opponent controls. That creature's owner mills cards equal to its mana value. Cover up 4—{4}{U}{U} ({4}{U}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Look at the top four cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Cover up only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Syphon Psyche
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from that player's graveyard and/or hand. Exile those cards. Cover up 2—{3}{B} ({3}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Cover up only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Essence Shift
card.text: Choose one or both — • Return target creature to its owner's hand. • Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Chosen of the Worldsoul
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature if its power is less than this creature's power. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Spore Waltz
card.text: Create X 1/1 green Saproling creature tokens. Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Until end of turn, you have hexproof and prevent all damage dealt to you.

card.name: Vanish // Vanguard
card.text:
Choose one — • Exile target artifact. • Exile target enchantment. • Exile target player's graveyard.
---
Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. They gain first strike and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Circu, Butcher of Memories
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from your hand, target player mills three cards. You may exile a nonland card from among the cards milled this way with a lobotomy counter on it. You may cast that card for as long as it remains exiled, and mana of any type can be spent to cast that spell. This ability triggers only once each turn. Your opponents can't cast spells with the same name as a card with a lobotomy counter on it.

card.name: Examination // Exaction
card.text:
Look at the top three cards of target player's library. Put one of them into that player's hand and the rest into their graveyard.
---
Gain control of target creature. It gains "At the beginning of each upkeep, this creature's owner loses 1 life."

card.name: Incisive Reversal
card.text: Counter target spell. Its controller loses 2 life. Cover up 3—{2}{U}{B} ({2}{U}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Cover up only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Sewer Grafter
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, each player mills three cards. You may exile a creature card from among the cards milled this way. Whenever you exile one or more creature cards from a graveyard, up to one target creature becomes a copy of one of those creature card until end of turn.

card.name: Unending Nightmare
card.text: Menace This creature can't block. When this creature enters, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand. Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, you may return this card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Boon of the Worldsoul
card.text: Return up to two target permanent cards from your graveyard to your hand, then you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Selesnya Sporewielder
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. Then if three or more cards have been exiled with this creature, flourish 2. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.)

card.name: Cemetery Guardian
card.text: Flying Oblation 3 — When this creature enters, you may pay 3 life. When you do, exile target player's graveyard. Create a 1/1 black and white Spirit creature token with flying for each creature card exiled this way.

card.name: Cruel Advokist
card.text: Lifelink As this creature enters, look at an opponent's hand, then choose any nonland card name. Whenever an opponent casts a spell with the chosen name or activates an ability of a card or permanent with the chosen name, this creature deals 3 damage to that player.

card.name: Dispossession
card.text: Destroy all creatures. Exile all graveyards and all cards in exile.

card.name: Milana, Orzhov High Prelate
card.text: Whenever you pay life, you may look at that many cards from the top of target opponent's library, exile one of them face down, then put the rest into their graveyard. You may cast that card for as long as it remains exiled, and mana of any type can be spent to cast that spell. Do this only once each turn. Whenever you cast a spell you don't own, you gain life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Vitality // Vitelline
card.text:
Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains lifelink and indestructible until end of turn.
---
Exile target creature card from your graveyard. Create a token that's a copy of that card, except it's a 1/1 Spirit in addition to its other types with flying. Create a black Zombie creature token with power and toughness equal to that card's power and toughness.

card.name: Disunite
card.text: Counter target instant or sorcery spell. If that spell is countered this way, exile it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard.

card.name: Dissect Thoughts
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1} for each card in your graveyard. If they do, draw a card.

card.name: Righteous Rebuke
card.text: Counter target permanent spell. Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Facsimile Project
card.text: Create X tokens that are copies of target artifact or creature you control, except the tokens aren't legendary.

card.name: Subvert
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature can't become untapped and can't have counters put on it. If it is monocolored, it also loses all abilities and has base power and toughness 0/1.

card.name: Bloodletter's Bat
card.text: Flying Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)

card.name: Wild Stomper
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, exile up to one target card from a graveyard, then it rages. (Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.)

card.name: Hyper Space Time Bubble
card.text: Flip [[b]one[/b]] coin(s). For each flip you win, take an extra turn after this one. For each flip you lose, add {U}{U}{R}{R} and exile the top two cards of your library. Until end of your next turn, you may play those cards. Iterate {7}{U}{UR}{UR}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its iterate cost. If you do, double the numbers in square brackets in its text. Then exile it.)

card.name: Ashentrunk Incinerator
card.text: Damage dealt by creatures you control can't be prevented. Damage isn't removed from creatures your opponents control during cleanup steps. When this creature enters, you gain X life and it rages X times. (Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.)

card.name: Factory Sentinel
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, draw two cards, then discard a card. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, add that much mana in any combination of {U} and/or {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. This mana can't be spent to cast permanent spells.

card.name: Heart of Cinders
card.text: Ward—Pay life equal to this creature's power. Whenever this creature enters or attacks, it rages, then return up to one land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. (Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.)

card.name: Flourishing Phytohydra
card.text: If damage would be dealt to this creature, prevent that damage. When damage is prevented this way, put that many +1/+1 counters on this creature. Whenever this creature attacks, flourish X, where X is the number of +1/+1 counters on this creature. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to X creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.)

card.name: Dimir Necrosage
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Flying, deathtouch, hexproof Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Coldhearted Cardinal
card.text: Flying, double strike Oblation 4 — When this creature enters, you may pay 4 life. When you do, target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from that player's graveyard or hand. Search that player's graveyard, hand, and library for any number of cards with the same name as that card and exile them. Then that player shuffles.

card.name: Bolrac-Clan City Breacher
card.text: Menace, reach, trample

card.name: Fiery Form
card.text: Up to one target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Fiery Form deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Gorz'Ghum, War Incense
card.text: You may play cards from your graveyard that you've discarded this turn. {8}{R}{G}, {T}: Create a 4/4 red and green Beast creature token with trample. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each land and creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Gravel-Hide Channeler
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. If that mana is spent to cast a creature spell, it can't be countered and it gains "When this creature enters, it rages." (Put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.)

card.name: Wrath Guildmage
card.text: {RG}, {T}: The next spell you cast this turn can't be countered. {2}{R}{G}: Double the power and toughness of target creature you control until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Ravage
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each monocolored permanent it targets. Choose one — • This spell deals 6 damage to up to one target creature. • Up to three target creatures can't block this turn.

card.name: Static Elemental
card.text: Defender (This creature can't attack.) As long as you've cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn, this creature can attack as though it didn't have defender.

card.name: Alcarus, Old Growth Protector
card.text: First strike, reach When Alcarus enters, create Durn'mir, a legendary 2/3 green and white Bird creature token with flying. Each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it has trample.

card.name: Burgeoning Troops
card.text: When this enchantment enters, flourish 3. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to three creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.) Each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it has vigilance and "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: Harmony Guildmage
card.text: {1}{GW}, {T}: Create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token. {3}{G}{W}: Flourish 2. Activate only as a sorcery. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.)

card.name: Ironroot Bindings
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. Create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token.

card.name: Poised to Strike
card.text: Choose target creature or planeswalker you don't control. Each creature you control deals damage equal to its power to that permanent.

card.name: Rise // Shine
card.text:
Create two 1/1 green Saproling creature tokens.
---
Create a green and white Elemental creature token, with "This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creatures you control."

card.name: Rootguard Loxodon
card.text: During your turn, this creature has lifelink. During turns other than yours, this creature has deathtouch. {G}{W}: Untap this creature. Activate only if you control a creature with a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Flaming Claws
card.text: You may cast this spell as though it had flash if you control a creature with a +1/+1 counter on it. Enchant creature you control Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has first strike.

card.name: Repurpose the Scraps
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard [[b]one[/b]] card(s). Draw [[b]two[/b]] cards and create [[b]one[/b]] Treasure token(s). Iterate {6}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its iterate cost. If you do, double the numbers in square brackets in its text. Then exile it.)

card.name: Reconfigure
card.text: Choose one — • Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Profane
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay 3 life or discard a card. Destroy target creature, enchantment or planeswalker.

card.name: Devotion Guildmage
card.text: {WB}, {T}: Exile up to one target card from a graveyard. You gain 1 life. {3}{W}{B}: This creature deals 2 damage to target opponent or planeswalker. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Priest of Purification
card.text: If one or more cards and/or tokens would be put into an opponent's graveyard from anywhere, exile them instead. You gain 1 life. At the beginning of your end step, if you gained or lost life this turn, each opponent loses 1 life. If you gained and lost life this turn, they lose 2 life instead.

card.name: Skin // Bones
card.text:
You gain 3 life. Draw a card.
---
You gain 2 life. Return up to one target creature if it has mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield, where X is the amount of life you gained this turn.

card.name: The Cozen
card.text: As long as you've lost life during your turn, The Cozen has first strike and deathtouch. Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. When The Cozen dies, you gain life equal to their power.

card.name: Ironclad Cyclops
card.text: Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.) Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, untap this creature.

card.name: Wave of Agitation
card.text: This spell deals 1 damage to each opponent and each creature and planeswalker they control. Creatures damaged this way can't block this turn and must attack this turn if able.

card.name: Cerebrospiker
card.text: This spell deals [[b]2[/b]] damage to target opponent. Look at the top [[b]two[/b]] cards of your library, then put a card from among them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Iterate {4}{U}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its iterate cost. If you do, double the numbers in square brackets in its text. Then exile it.)

card.name: Innovation Guildmage
card.text: {2}{UR}, {T}: Draw two cards, then discard two cards. {2}{U}{R}: Copy target instant spell, sorcery spell, activated ability, or triggered ability you control. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Now // Again
card.text:
Draw a card.
---
When you next cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Polarity Switcher
card.text: Ward {2} Whenever this creature enters or attacks, choose one — • Two target creatures exchange their power and toughness until of turn. • Switch target creature's power and toughness until end of turn.

card.name: Rix Navven, Overcharged Brute
card.text: Trample, ward {1} Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may have Rix Navven get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the amount of mana spent to cast that spell. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Necrotic Haze
card.text: Remove a counter from each permanent. All creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Scorching Thunder
card.text: Players can't gain life this turn. Damage can't be prevented this turn. This spell deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker. Excess damage is dealt to that permanent's controller instead.

card.name: Eidolon's Fury
card.text: When this enchantment enters, it deals 3 damage to any target. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, return this enchantment to its owner's hand.

card.name: Crazed Rioter
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Whenever you discard one or more cards, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Archspire Hellkite
card.text: Flying {2}{R}: This creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of Gates you control.

card.name: Eidolon's Thirst
card.text: When this enchantment enters, each opponent loses 2 life and discards a card. You gain life equal to the life lost this way. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, return this enchantment to its owner's hand.

card.name: Dimir Cutthroat
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card unless a card left your graveyard or was put into your graveyard this turn.

card.name: Lost // Forgotten
card.text:
Put target creature or planeswalker you don't control on top of its owner's library.
---
Target player mills three cards, then each opponent loses X life, where X the total number of creature and planeswalker cards in that player's graveyard.

card.name: Violent Reshaping
card.text: Up to one target creature gets -8/-4 until end of turn. Up to one target player mills three cards.

card.name: Zorin, Hiding in Plain Sight
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard from a graveyard, choose one. This ability triggers only once each turn. • Put a +1/+1 counter on Zorin. She can't be blocked until end of turn. • Create a Treasure token.

card.name: Rabid Sewer Rat
card.text: Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.) When this creature enters, target player mills two cards.

card.name: Sharer of the Ichor
card.text: Oblation 3 — When this creature enters, you may pay 3 life. When you do, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Escaped Prototype
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. Spend this mana only to cast instant or sorcery spells or activate abilities.

card.name: Corrosive Bile Spitter
card.text: Deathtouch {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Door to Everywhere
card.text: When this artifact enters, search your library for a basic land or a Gate card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. {5}, {T}: Target creature can't be blocked until end of turn. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each Gate you control.

card.name: Devoted Marshal
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink Whenever you gain or lose life during your turn, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn – • Create a tapped 1/1 white Human creature token. • Create a tapped Treasure token. • Surveil 2.

card.name: Third District Sharpshooter
card.text: You may cast this spell as though it had flash if you control two or more Gates. Reach When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains reach until your next turn.

card.name: Undercity Bloodthirster
card.text: Flying, lifelink If your life total is less than your starting life total, this spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the difference.

card.name: Shredding Barrage
card.text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying. This spell deals 1 damage to each creature with flying your opponents control.

card.name: Tend to the Gardens
card.text: Enchant land you control When this Aura enters, search your library for a basic or Gate land card, reveal it, put it into your hand then shuffle. Enchanted land has "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: Blessing of Wrath
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Untap it.

card.name: Desenite Enforcers
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked by a monocolored creature, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each of those creatures.

card.name: Insatiable Moroii
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you lose 2 life. Whenever you lose life during your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Cloud Drinker
card.text: Flying, vigilance, ward {2} Whenever this creature attacks, target player mills X cards, where X is the number of cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Eidolon's Wisdom
card.text: When this enchantment enters, surveil 2, then draw two cards, then discard a card. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, return this enchantment to its owner's hand.

card.name: Secret Seeker
card.text: Flash Flying At the beginning of your end step, if one or more instant or sorcery cards left your graveyard this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Forgotten Phantasm
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Oppress
card.text: Destroy target creature. You lose 3 life unless you destroyed a monocolored creature this way.

card.name: 4/4 Rhino RNF
card.text: Trample

card.name: 5/5 Wurm RNF
card.text: Trample

card.name: 2/3 Durn' Mir RNF
card.text: Flying

card.name: Aspect of Uniformity
card.text: You may have creatures you control enter as a copy of this creature. As long as you control six or more creatures names Aspect of Uniformity, creatures you control get +6/+6 and have double strike, vigilance, lifelink, trample, hexproof and indestructible.

card.name: Above // Beyond
card.text:
Target creature you control gets +2/+2 and gains reach until end of turn.
---
Target creature you control gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Blooming Sanctuary
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}{G}{W}: This land becomes a 2/2 green and white Elemental creature with "Whenever this creature attacks, flourish 2." until end of turn. It's still a land. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.)

card.name: Vengeful Return
card.text: Flash Enchant creature you control Enchanted creature gets +2/+0. When enchanted creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it. Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: 1/1 Faerie RNF
card.text: Flying, prowess

card.name: Conclave Spirewatch
card.text: Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.) {1}{G}: This creature gains deathtouch until end of turn. (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)

card.name: Escalating Wrath
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control rages. It gains your choice of trample or haste until end of turn. (Put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.)

card.name: Spectral Rider
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks and is unblocked, target player mills three cards. {1}{B}: This creature gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Seventh District Scoundrel
card.text: When this creature enters, tap target creature you don't control and put a stun counter on it. {5}{U}, {T}: Surveil 2. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each Gate you control.

card.name: Eidolon's Call
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create two 1/1 white Human creature tokens. You gain 2 life. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, return this enchantment to its owner's hand.

card.name: Retriever of Secrets
card.text: When this creature enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 1. Whenever one or more cards are put into exile from your library and/or your graveyard, you may pay {2}. If you do, put an instant, sorcery or creature card among those cards into your hand.

card.name: Gate Penumbra
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 2. Whenever a Gate you control enters, this creature gains menace and deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Writhing Amalgamate
card.text: Cover up 2—{3}{B}{B} ({3}{B}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Cover up only as a sorcery.) When you cover up this card, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Galvanizing Call
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Untap them.

card.name: Blessing of Vitu-Ghazi
card.text: Enchant creature you control When this enchantment enters, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each creature you control or each counter among creatures you control, whichever is greater.

card.name: Memorable Feast
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or token. Draw two cards and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Rousing Freemage
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, each of up to X target creatures you control gets +1/+1 and gains flying until end of turn, where X is the number of Gates you control.

card.name: Guildpact's Blessing
card.text: Flash Enchant creature you control When this Aura enters, untap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature gets +1/+3 hexproof from monocolored.

card.name: Surgical Strike
card.text: Choose a target creature you control. If it has a +1/+1 counter on it, it gains double strike until end of turn. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Druid of the Votary
card.text: This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. During your turn, you and other creatures you control with a +1/+1 counter on them have hexproof. {1}{G}: Move a +1/+1 counter from target creature you control onto another target creature you control.

card.name: Eidolon's Vitality
card.text: When this enchantment enters, search your library for a creature card with mana value 2 or less, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, return this enchantment to its owner's hand.

card.name: Righteous Outburst
card.text: Target creature you control gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of Gates you control. Then it deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control.

card.name: Furious Pangoduan
card.text: Vigilance, haste Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell you control, it rages. (You may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.)

card.name: Wasteful Inheritor
card.text: Oblation 2 — When this creature enters, you may pay 2 life. When you do, create two Treasure tokens. {1}, Sacrifice another creature or token: Surveil 1, then draw a card.

card.name: District Explorer
card.text: When this creature enters, look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Ruins Scavenger
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, you draw a card and you lose 1 life. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: 1/1 Bat RNF
card.text: Flying

card.name: Deep Wound
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -2/-2. When this Deep Wound is put into your graveyard from anywhere, surveil 1.

card.name: Emmara, Ancestral Caregiver
card.text: Whenever Emmara or another nontoken creature you control dies, if it had one or more +1/+1 counters on it, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token. {3}{G}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Selesnya Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Dew's Benediction
card.text: Whenever you gain life, choose one. This ability triggers only once during each of your turns. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains indestructible until end of turn. • Create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: Gruul Guildgate
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Profitable Demise
card.text: Oblation 3 — When this enchantment enters, you may pay 3 life. When you do, each opponent sacrifices a creature. Whenever you pay life and/or one or more creatures an opponent controls die, put that many blood counters on this enchantment. {1}{B}, Remove four blood counters from this enchantment: Draw a card.

card.name: Replicating Flare
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target artifact or creature with mana value [[b]3[/b]] or less. It gains haste until end of turn. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step unless this spell was cast from your graveyard. Iterate {4}{U}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its iterate cost. If you do, double the numbers in square brackets in its text. Then exile it.)

card.name: Manipulation Guildmage
card.text: {UB}, {T}: Target player mills two cards. {3}{U}{B}: Each opponent discards a card and you draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Vernadi Protector
card.text: When this creature enters, flourish 2. (Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each of those creatures.) Each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it has ward {1}.

card.name: Ledev Rescue
card.text: You may cast this spell as though it had flash if {W} was spent to cast it. Create a 3/3 green Centaur creature token and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Chains of Torment
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. At the beginning of your end step, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Due of the Powerless
card.text: Artifacts, creatures and nonbasic lands your opponents control enter tapped. Spells your opponents cast during your turn cost an additional 2 life to cast. Whenever an opponent loses life, you gain 1 life. (Damage causes loss of life.)

card.name: Dryads' Blessing
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. • Prevent all damage that would be dealt this turn.

card.name: Mindflayer of the Dim
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • Gain control of target permanent. It gains hexproof and "At the beginning of your end step, this permanent's owner loses 1 life." • Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from that player's graveyard or hand and exile it. Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Locket of Communion
card.text: Multicolored creatures you control get +1/+1. {T}: Add one mana of any color. {WU}{UB}{BR}{RG}{GW}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw three cards.

card.name: 1/1 Selesnya Soldier RNF
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: 1/1 Orzhov Soldier RNF
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: 4/4 Beast RNF
card.text: Trample

card.name: Screeching Aberration
card.text: Flying Ward—Pay 2 life. Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, create a 1/1 blue and black Horror creature token with flying.

card.name: 1/1 Horror RNF
card.text: Flying

card.name: Gateway Curse
card.text: Target player discards to cards. If you control two or more gates, they discard three cards instead.

card.name: Rubblebelt Explorer
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, remove up to three +1/+1 counters from among creatures you control. Choose one for each counter removed this way — • Destroy target artifact or enchantment. • You gain 4 life. • Exile target player's graveyard.
